Action Taken: Corrective Action : The dead stopper was adjusted to increase the tension in the spring.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The height of the vacuum pad was too high, which resulted in insufficient spring tension during the pick operation.
Alarm/ Indication : “bofClose2_VacuumMove1 is not restored to its initial state Q5.4” indication in HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : The damaged Part was replaced with a new one.

Problem Description: Root Cause: The rubber seal for vacuum formation in carrier at loading Stage was damage, leading to a loss of vacuum and triggering the alarm.
Alarm/ Indication : “Robot 2 Clamp Cylinder not ON” – Alarm indication in the Ft machine.
Action Taken: Corrective Action : The Z-axis height at this position of the robot was adjusted upward by 0.5 mm to prevent the clamp from getting stuck in the open position.

Problem Description: Root Cause: At channel No. 31, the clamp was getting stuck while opening, which triggered the alarm.
Action Taken: The machine was monitored for 4 hours to ensure the issue was resolved.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication : “VHB feed turntable2 axis alarm( Drive Mode Alarm)”.

Alarm/ Indication: Pull Tape wrap NG at LQC station
Action Taken: Corrective Action : New Silicon Pad replaced.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The silicon pad on VHB Wrap block1 is damaged, affecting the tape wrapping process.
Action Taken: And Adjust the wrapping parameter to avoid the Pull Tape Ng and Pad Damage.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: : “No material bright abnormally in place on the feeding platform”X15.5” Alarm indication in HMI.
Action Taken: Corrective Action: Adjust the Tray separator cylinder to realign the feeding tray and ensure proper detection by the tray presence sensor.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The last feeding tray is not detected by the tray presence sensor because it is misaligned by the tray separator cylinder before reaching the cell discharge position.
Action Taken: Feeding tray take Upward servo position.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “Abnormal situation of no material on the material detection 3 of the middle rotating disk of the protection plate -- X10.16” indication on HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : The optical fiber sensor cable was replaced and reconnected to the amplifier.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The PCM presence sensor at the PCM loading turntable experienced a permanent low signal due to a breakage in the middle of the optical fiber cable.
Action Taken: The optical fiber cable has been properly dressed and secured to prevent any future breakage.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “Feeder1 feeding Abnormal” alarm displayed on HMI.
Action Taken: Corrective Action : The sticked tape was removed from the feeder, and the feeder was reinitialized to resolve the issue.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The tape which is used to get NG during Roll Setup are accumulated in the unreel roller. This accumulation caused the roller to become stuck.
Action Taken: Operator training has been conducted to ensure that the roller is cleaned thoroughly during each roll change to prevent similar issues in the future also Instruction provided.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “2# Robot does not respond alarm” indication on HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : OSS and supplier support were engaged to resolve the issue and The hand mode command for tester number 31 was adjusted from the CCD settings to match the correct mode, resolving the soft limit issue.

Problem Description: Root Cause :Mismatch in hand mode settings between tester number 31 and other testers, caused by incorrect hand mode command from the CCD configuration.
Action Taken: Check all 4 robots at each tester to ensure proper hand mode settings are consistently applied.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “Vacuum_VHBTrans1 is not ON X1011” indication on HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : Installed two button head bolts at each feeder and verified effectiveness over 6 hours, with positive results.

Problem Description: Root Cause : Insufficient bolting separator at the feeder with only one bolt used for VHB separation, leading to ineffective translocation and vacuum alarm.
Action Taken: Update PM check sheet to include verification of two Button Head Bolts at each feeder.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “The CCD measuring upload accumulated NG alarm” indication in HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : Ceramic cutter was replaced with a new one to restore proper cutting quality.

Problem Description: Root Cause : On Checking Tab ceramic cutter we found proper sharpness is not there, leading to suboptimal cutting performance and CCD NG was coming.
Action Taken: Added a point to the TBM (Time Based Maintenance) check sheet to monitor cutter life.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “Insufficient Air Pressure “ alarm indication in HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : Replaced the faulty pressure gauge with a new one to restore proper pressure readings and eliminate the alarm.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The pressure gauge was faulty and could not send the output to the PLC, which triggered the alarm.
Alarm/ Indication: “Feida 1 abnormal feeding” alarm indication on HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : Replaced the broken bolt with a new one and realigned the mounting to ensure proper functioning of the feeder.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The bolt of the feeder's upper clamp cylinder got loose resulted overstress, leading to the abnormal feeder condition.
Action Taken: Now point added in the PM Checksheet to check the 0.1mm gap by filler gauge between plate and clamp.

Problem Description: Alarm/ Indication: “PCD Detection CCD accumulated NG alarm” indication on HMI
Action Taken: Corrective Action : Replaced the dim CCD light with a new one to resolve the issue.

Problem Description: Root Cause : The CCD light was found low due to an internal fault in the CCD light .
Action Taken: After checking and analyzing, it was determined that the CCD software contrast settings were correct, indicating that the issue was the light only.

Coupler type communication and Power cable are using in device.

Problem Description: ‘’Adhesive X-Axis servo drive alarm” > During analysis we found, adhesive X-axis servo overload alarm was coming on the HMI. It happened due to manual operation of adhesive feeder both axis motion. Because both axis have no interlocking in the PLC program “ X axis motion was happening without Y axis on drop position”.
Action Taken: Servo drive alarm reset by Penatrum software.

Problem Description: Calibration NG issue observed in TZTEK machine. Misalignment in measurement accuracy led to inconsistent results and stoppage
Action Taken: Issue escalated to TZTEK supplier. Supplier’s technical support , carried out troubleshooting, and corrected calibration. Machine performance normalized after intervention.

Problem Description: Due to customer Process quality audit line was stopping intermittently and Production was hampering
Action Taken: Situation coincided with customer visit. All carriers for rejudgement were on hold, which delayed replenishment.

Problem Description: ITS system not in operation and A11 machine motion timeout alarm triggered. Outbound data not being received.
Action Taken: ITS system re-initialized. PA Card of module #22 replaced. A11 machine re-initialized successfully. Monitoring done after corrective action to ensure stability.

Problem Description: Planned : Workorder and Part Number (PN) Change
Action Taken: Changeover completed systematically with proper workorder update and PN verification in system. Production resumed after validation.
Teaching done on all robots. All robot clamping blocks adjusted according to connector. Software changed by DBA and teaching method changed from Manual to Automatic with the support of DBA.
High rejudgement of FAI 31 leading to low UPH. Detection of cell edge flatness FAI31-5, FAI31-7. Low UPH mainly due to incoming material issue.

Problem Description: Main Control not ON at FT Machine
Action Taken: 24VDC was malfunctioning due to Faulty SMPS. Replaced the faulty SMPS with new one -SMPS RSP-500-24 Relocated the SMPS to a more accessible position to reduce MTTR.
All 4 Macs restarted, then run. Mac mini restarted. System reboot resolved connectivity issue. Overlay will be updated Cp: 04-10-2025

MACHINE: Conveyor sensor malfunction caused alarm in machine
Problem Description: Conveyor sensor replaced with a new one

MACHINE: Calibration issue – data not shown during calibration
Problem Description: Calibration attempted 5 times, succeeded after 3 tries
Root Cause: Ensure calibration data is properly loaded before starting process
Action Taken: Data not loading properly during calibration

Problem Description: Cosmetic sticking robot block was repaired, and the tape picking/sticking position was adjusted also lubrication done
Root Cause: Applied thread lock and tightened bolts - Changed bolt size from 3.5 mm to 3.8 mm - New Robot spare mounting will be made to avoid this in future to reduce MTTR.

MACHINE: Cam‑in shift‑roll cylinder did not return to the home position.
Problem Description: Replaced cam‑in roll cylinder with spare (Model HRQ10). Machine restarted and verified OK.
Root Cause: External stopper will be added to limit gear‑tooth load. -point to be added in TBM checksheet for Cylinder life monitoring.

MACHINE: HMI displayed Alarm 353 without proper description; alarm could not be reset even after power OFF
Problem Description: Alarm was reset through PLC with OSS team support. HMI comment updated to: "A Cavity inflation time is long…" Initial cavity pressure reduced from 9 kPa to 3 kPa.
Root Cause: 1. Modify PLC Program for Alarm Reset Functionality What: Modify PLC logic to allow Alarm 353 to be reset via HMI reset button. When: By 20/05/2025 Who: KB 2..Check and Resolve Chamber A Leakage in Inflation and Leakage Pipe What: Inspect and fix any leakage causing alarm delay or cavity inflation issue. When: By 23/05/2025 Who: Maintenance Team

MACHINE: ST 10 _S2_ camera photographing finish signal Return Time Out
Problem Description: Cylinder pipe fund leakage After close the pipe leakage Machine initialization then Run
Root Cause: Cut the Pipe and add I Connector B/W Pipe
Action Taken: Machine Stop Due to ST 10 _S2_ camera photographing finish signal Return Time Out Alarm
